query:
-- 総データ件数
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM biddings;

-- 最新のデータ（作成日時順）
SELECT id, title, orderOrganName, createdAt, firstSeenAt, lastSeenAt 
FROM biddings 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;

-- 最古のデータ（作成日時順）
SELECT id, title, orderOrganName, createdAt, firstSeenAt, lastSeenAt 
FROM biddings 
ORDER BY createdAt ASC 
LIMIT 10;

-- 日付ごとのデータ件数
SELECT DATE(createdAt) as date, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM biddings 
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) 
ORDER BY date DESC;

-- 最古のデータ（作成日時順）
SELECT id, title, orderOrganName, createdAt, firstSeenAt, lastSeenAt 
FROM biddings 
ORDER BY createdAt ASC 
LIMIT 10;

-- 日付ごとのデータ件数
SELECT DATE(createdAt) as date, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM biddings 
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) 
ORDER BY date DESC;
